description: Claude Code agent definition (stored as .claude/agents/<agent-id>.md with YAML frontmatter)

agentId.title: Agent ID
agentId.description: Unique slug identifier for this agent (lowercase, hyphens, numbers only)

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable display name for this agent

description.title: Description
description.description: Brief description of what this agent does

x-field.placeholder: Brief description of what this agent does

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that defines this agent's behavior and personality

x-field.placeholder: You are a helpful assistant that...

tools.title: Allowed Tools
tools.description: Tools this agent is allowed to use. Empty means all tools are available.

modelOverride.title: Model Override
modelOverride.description: Override the default model for this agent. Use short names (opus, sonnet, haiku) or full model IDs.

x-field.placeholder: Type a model name or select one

memory.title: Memory Scope
memory.description: Optional memory scope binding for this agent
